description:
This quiz tests fundamental to intermediate CSS knowledge, emphasizing modern techniques and practical application. It uses a challenging yet approachable tone to engage learners in assessing their readiness to include CSS on their resumes.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern CSS techniques, Responsive design, Layout methods (Flexbox/Grid), CSS variables, Selector specificity
Audience: Developers learning or refreshing CSS skills, particularly those preparing for technical interviews or resume-building.
